name: Knightowl
description: '''Knightowl''' (sometimes styled as '''Mr. Knightowl''') (May 13, 1966 – February 11, 2022), born '''Ramon Corona''', was a Mexican-born American  [[rapper]]. He began recording in 1993. His fame came with the hit singles ''Daddy I'm In Love With a Gangsta'' and ''Here Comes  The Knightowl''.
